suite.name: LoginTests

test.name: TC_01 Valid Login Should Succeed

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Alert Should Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Đăng nhập thành công với tài khoản hợp lệ

test.name: TC_02 Login With Empty Fields

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Disabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.msg: ${validation_msg} = Please include an '@' in the email address. 'invalid_email' is missing an '@'.

kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Alert Should Be Present
kw.doc: Verifies that an alert is present and by default, accepts it.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: TC_13 Register With Empty Confirm Password

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: No keyword will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test User' into text field 'id:name'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
